ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or stakeholder */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the branch belongs to */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent branch (0 if root) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Name or description of the branch */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the branch (e.g., in progress, finalized) */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Total hours logged for the branch */,
  "has_kids" INTEGER /* Indicates if the branch has child tasks */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the branch (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the branch */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the branch */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours required to complete the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the task */,
  "actual_hours" TEXT /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the time is logged against */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logging the time */,
  "hours_logged" TEXT /* Number of hours logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the time was logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the time logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., image, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., task assignment, deadline alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has in the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the update */,
  "update_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the status update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
